extensions.name: Contoh skill pack (lokal)
extensions.description: Paket skill .md di ~/.local/share/cantrik/skill-registry/<nama>/ — dipasang ke .cantrik/skills/ lewat cantrik skill install.
extensions.install_hint: Letakkan manifest + file di ~/.local/share/cantrik/skill-registry/<nama>/ lalu: cantrik skill install <nama>

extensions.name: Skill demo (siap pakai dari repo)
extensions.description: Satu file contoh di contrib; cocok untuk uji cantrik skill install end-to-end.
extensions.install_hint:
Dari root clone cantrik:
  cp -r contrib/skill-registry/demo ~/.local/share/cantrik/skill-registry/demo
  cd <proyek-anda> && cantrik skill install demo

extensions.name: Skill: konvensi Rust CLI
extensions.description: Gaya kode CLI ala Cantrik (Result, clap, modul, fmt/clippy/test).
extensions.install_hint:
cp -r contrib/skill-registry/rust-cli-conventions ~/.local/share/cantrik/skill-registry/rust-cli-conventions
  cd <proyek> && cantrik skill install rust-cli-conventions

extensions.name: Skill: checklist review kode
extensions.description: Panduan ringkas untuk agen saat review PR/diff (correctness, tes, security, UX).
extensions.install_hint:
cp -r contrib/skill-registry/code-review-checklist ~/.local/share/cantrik/skill-registry/code-review-checklist
  cd <proyek> && cantrik skill install code-review-checklist

extensions.name: Skill: MCP untuk agen coding
extensions.description: Kapan pakai MCP, providers.toml, cantrik mcp call, dan kesadaran offline/safety.
extensions.install_hint:
cp -r contrib/skill-registry/agent-mcp-basics ~/.local/share/cantrik/skill-registry/agent-mcp-basics
  cd <proyek> && cantrik skill install agent-mcp-basics

extensions.name: Skill: pola tes Rust
extensions.description: Unit test, tempfile, async tokio::test, scope cargo test -p.
extensions.install_hint:
cp -r contrib/skill-registry/rust-testing-hints ~/.local/share/cantrik/skill-registry/rust-testing-hints
  cd <proyek> && cantrik skill install rust-testing-hints

extensions.name: Skill: dokumentasi & ADR
extensions.description: README, ADR, gaya penulisan teknis yang akurat.
extensions.install_hint:
cp -r contrib/skill-registry/docs-and-adrs ~/.local/share/cantrik/skill-registry/docs-and-adrs
  cd <proyek> && cantrik skill install docs-and-adrs

extensions.name: Skill: menulis paket skill .md
extensions.description: Cara menyusun manifest.toml dan file skills untuk registry lokal Cantrik.
extensions.install_hint:
cp -r contrib/skill-registry/skill-pack-authoring ~/.local/share/cantrik/skill-registry/skill-pack-authoring
  cd <proyek> && cantrik skill install skill-pack-authoring

extensions.name: Plugin Lua (.cantrik/plugins)
extensions.description: Hook on_task_start / after_write; cocok untuk saran otomatis atau logging. Tidak diunduh otomatis dari hub.
extensions.install_hint: Salin file .lua ke .cantrik/plugins/ — lalu uji dengan cantrik ask (on_task_start) atau write_file (after_write).

extensions.name: Plugin WASM (.cantrik/plugins)
extensions.description: Hook WASM minimal (mis. after_write_ping); guest tanpa WASI di MVP.
extensions.install_hint: Letakkan .wasm di .cantrik/plugins/ — lihat contoh WAT di contrib/wasm/

extensions.name: MCP server (stdio) — pola TOML
extensions.description: Kerangka [[mcp_client.servers]]; ganti command/args ke server pilihan Anda.
extensions.install_hint:
Tambahkan ke ~/.config/cantrik/providers.toml:

[[mcp_client.servers]]
name = "example"
command = "npx"
args = ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem", "/path/to/allowed"]

Lalu: cantrik mcp call example <tool> --json '{}'

extensions.name: MCP: filesystem (npm official)
extensions.description: Akses terbatas ke satu direktori di disk lewat MCP stdio.
extensions.install_hint:
~/.config/cantrik/providers.toml:

[[mcp_client.servers]]
name = "fs"
command = "npx"
args = ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem", "/ABS/PATH/ANDA"]

Uji: cantrik mcp call fs list_directory --json '{"path":"."}'

extensions.name: MCP: GitHub API
extensions.description: Tool GitHub (issue, repo, …) via MCP. Token hanya lewat environment, jangan commit.
extensions.install_hint:
Export token dulu: export GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN=...  (atau sesuai dokumentasi paket)

[[mcp_client.servers]]
name = "github"
command = "npx"
args = ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-github"]

Uji: cantrik mcp call github search_repositories --json '{"query":"cantrik"}'

extensions.name: MCP: fetch HTTP
extensions.description: Ambil konten URL lewat MCP (berguna untuk agen yang butuh halaman web terkontrol).
extensions.install_hint:
[[mcp_client.servers]]
name = "fetch"
command = "npx"
args = ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-fetch"]

Uji dengan tool yang didokumentasikan paket (mis. fetch).

extensions.name: MCP: git lokal
extensions.description: Operasi git read-oriented lewat MCP pada repo lokal.
extensions.install_hint:
[[mcp_client.servers]]
name = "git"
command = "npx"
args = ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-git", "--repository", "/ABS/PATH/REPO"]

Sesuaikan path repo; cek daftar tool: dokumentasi server-git.

extensions.name: MCP: memory (knowledge graph)
extensions.description: Penyimpanan fakta/relasi antar sesi untuk agen yang butuh memori jangka panjang.
extensions.install_hint:
[[mcp_client.servers]]
name = "memory"
command = "npx"
args = ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-memory"]

Data biasanya lokal; tinjau privasi sebelum produksi.

extensions.name: MCP: Brave Search
extensions.description: Pencarian web via Brave Search API (perlu kunci API di environment).
extensions.install_hint:
export BRAVE_API_KEY=...   # jangan commit

[[mcp_client.servers]]
name = "brave"
command = "npx"
args = ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-brave-search"]

Cantrik juga punya cantrik web search terpisah; pilih sesuai kebijakan proyek.

extensions.name: MCP: everything (demo/reference)
extensions.description: Server referensi MCP dengan banyak tool dummy — cocok untuk belajar wiring, bukan produksi.
extensions.install_hint:
[[mcp_client.servers]]
name = "everything"
command = "npx"
args = ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-everything"]

Uji: cantrik mcp call everything echo --json '{"message":"hi"}'

extensions.name: MCP: sequential thinking
extensions.description: Alat bantu merapikan rantai pemikiran langkah-demi-langkah (berguna untuk agen perencana).
extensions.install_hint:
[[mcp_client.servers]]
name = "think"
command = "npx"
args = ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-sequential-thinking"]

Nama paket npm bisa berubah; verifikasi di npm jika perintah gagal.

extensions.name: Recipe: template generic (init)
extensions.description: Rujukan ke entri recipes di hub — cocok untuk proyek baru.
extensions.install_hint: cantrik init                    # atau buka /registry/recipes di hub untuk daftar template
